critique:
Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. The reasoning bypasses the required function-based process and provides a direct narrative explanation without applying any of the specified functions. It should have used f_select_column(year, position) to focus on relevant columns, f_select_row(position = '2nd') to filter for highest positions, and f_sort_column(year, descending) to identify the most recent year. The absence of these steps constitutes a misapplication of the framework.
